$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability, not yet wired into the live stack.
name: Knowledge Assistant
description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A and document ingestion over a personal knowledge base, backed by the future Qdrant vector DB for long-term memory and research archives.

envVars.name: KNOWLEDGE_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflows.

envVars.name: QDRANT_URL
envVars.description: Base URL of the Qdrant vector database (future core service).

envVars.name: QDRANT_API_KEY
envVars.description: Qdrant API key, if the instance requires auth. Stored only in .env.

envVars.name: KNOWLEDGE_COLLECTION
envVars.description: Qdrant collection name for stored documents/embeddings.

envVars.name: KNOWLEDGE_TOP_K
envVars.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query.
